hero.title: Ferienhaus Bela
hero.subtitle: Your dog-friendly holiday home in Carinthia, directly on the Vellach river. Pure relaxation and nature, only 4 km from Bad Eisenkappel.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ferienhaus Bela
welcome.p1: Our holiday house is located about 4 km after the spa town of Bad Eisenkappel, directly on the Vellach river (Slovenian: Bela). The idyllic location allows you to enjoy nature away from hustle and noise.
welcome.p2: Those seeking relaxation and active holidaymakers can enjoy nature on both sides of the border. Our location near the Slovenian border offers numerous excursion opportunities in two countries.
welcome.p3: Dogs are not only allowed but WARMLY WELCOME and stay free of charge!

intro.title: Holiday with Dog in Carinthia
intro.text: We are dog owners ourselves with three dogs and have designed our offer specifically for dog-friendly holidays. Here you and your furry friends can relax and enjoy nature.

king.name: King

memorial.title: In Loving Memory of Kira
memorial.subtitle: Border Collie Mix - Forever in Our Hearts
memorial.text: Will to please, ball junkie, attentive and the biggest cuddler. You enchanted countless guests with your gentle nature. We miss you every day.

hero.title: Surroundings / Activities / Traditions
hero.subtitle: Discover nature on both sides of the border - Carinthia and Slovenia

intro.title: Location & Surroundings
intro.text: The holiday house is located in Vellach, belongs to the market town of Bad Eisenkappel in Carinthia and is close to the Slovenian border. Those seeking relaxation and active holidaymakers can enjoy nature on both sides of the border. Extensive leisure opportunities, excursion destinations and a landscape with vibrant folklore and regional traditions await you.

highlights.title: Eisenkappel-Vellach Highlights
items: Two border crossings to Slovenia (Seebergsattel and Paulitschsattel)
Bad Eisenkappel is Austria's only place with the double designation spa town and health resort

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.intro: Discover the diverse landscape and culture of the region in our gallery. Click on an image for a larger view.

activities.title: Activities & Excursions
activities.intro: Whether hiking, cycling, swimming or cultural discoveries - the region offers something for every taste.

hiking.title: Hiking & Mountaineering
hiking.description: The mountain world around Bad Eisenkappel invites you to unforgettable hikes. From leisurely walks to challenging summit tours, everything is possible.

items.name: Hochobir (2,139m)
items.desc: Popular viewpoint mountain with panoramic views

items.name: Petzen
items.desc: Mountain railway, hiking trails and bike park

items.name: Luschaalm
items.desc: Alpine pasture hike with refreshment stop

nature.title: Natural Attractions
nature.description: Impressive natural wonders are waiting to be discovered.

items.name: Obir Stalactite Cave
items.desc: Fascinating cave world with guided tours

water.title: Water Sports & Leisure
water.description: Refreshing cooling and water fun in the area.

items.name: Sonnegger Lake
items.desc: Natural bathing place and outdoor pool

biking.title: Cycling & Biking
biking.description: From leisurely bike tours to action-packed downhill trails.

items.name: Mine Biking Petzen
items.desc: Unique mountain biking in a mine

culture.title: Cultural Attractions
culture.description: Experience the history and culture of the region.

items.name: Parish Church Bad Eisenkappel
items.desc: Historic church in the town center

jezersko.title: Our Insider Tip: Jezersko (Slovenia)
jezersko.description: The mountain village of Jezersko is surrounded by the Steiner Alps and the Karawanken range. It is particularly known for the heart-shaped reservoir, which is reminiscent of the former glacier lake that gave the place its name. A beautiful excursion destination just across the border!

traditions.title: Customs & Traditions
traditions.quote: Tradition makes one day different from another, one hour different from other hours.
traditions.intro: The region maintains a vibrant folklore with traditional festivals and customs throughout the year. These traditions are deeply rooted in the community and are passed down from generation to generation.

items.title: Ante Pante / Church Carrying
items.text: Traditional church carrying in Bad Eisenkappel with the saying "Ante pante populore, kocle vrate cvile lore" - a unique custom of the region.

items.title: Josefimarkt
items.text: Traditional market in Nötsch with regional products and crafts.

items.title: Palm Branch Carrying
items.text: Traditional custom during Holy Week with artfully bound palm branches.

items.title: Church Fairs
items.text: Traditional festivals like barrel jousting in Gailtal with music, dancing and regional specialties.

items.title: Midsummer Fire
items.text: Celebrations for the summer solstice with mountain fires throughout the region.

items.title: Polenta Festival
items.text: Traditional festival in Nötsch centered around the popular corn dish.

items.title: St. Barbara's Day
items.text: Traditional holiday of miners with special customs.

items.title: Krampus & Perchten
items.text: Spectacular parades by the Bad Eisenkappel Perchten group - a winter highlight.

items.title: Advent Markets & Rorate
items.text: Contemplative Advent season with traditional markets and early morning Rorate masses.

items.title: Horse Blessing
items.text: Traditional blessing of horses on St. Stephen's Day.

items.title: "Fresh and Healthy"
items.text: Traditional custom on Innocents' Day with birch rod strikes for health.

items.title: Star Singing
items.text: Traditional star singing in the New Year - the Three Wise Men go from house to house.

links.intro: Further information and planning aids for your stay.
